summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Rolle's theorem. Axes with BLUE f(x)=s sin(πx)+(1-0.5s)·2x(1-x) on [0, 1] with f(0)=f(1)=0 always. ValueTracker s_tr tours s={0.3, 0.6, 1.0, 0.0, 0.8} via always_redraw. Critical point c found via sign change of numerical f'; RED horizontal tangent line + dot + live f'(c) ≈ 0 readout.
